overview: Mothera is a comprehensive pregnancy and motherhood companion web app with two distinct flows — Pregnancy and Having Baby — each with personalized dashboards, reminders, wellness resources, AI assistant Tina, community, shopping, and classes.
features: Pregnancy dashboard with timeline, reminders, wellness, emergency SOS, and doctor connect
Having Baby dashboard with Mother's Wellness, vaccine reminders, and specialist doctor connect
AI assistant Tina with voice chat and pregnancy-friendly responses
Community hub with Mothers' and Baby topics and messaging
Shopping catalog for mothers and babies
Modern elegant design with distinct visual themes for each flow
